prompt: Using uploaded face 100 percent same & realistic. A hyper-realistic, cinematic portrait of a handsome young man with thick styled dark hair, a mustache, and a beard. He is confidently walking forward, looking slightly off-camera with a subtle smile. He is wearing a tailored light beige suit jacket and matching trousers, a plain white t-shirt underneath, and clean white sneakers. One hand is casually resting in his trouser pocket. The setting is ethereal and futuristic, featuring a highly reflective, glossy floor with low-lying white mist or fog rolling across it. Behind him stand four tall, vertical rectangular mirrors or glass panels. Each panel displays a slightly different reflection or alternate version of the same man in various poses and different outfits. Bright, clean studio lighting with a mix of cool and neutral tones, highly detailed, photorealistic, editorial fashion photography style. Keep original face and hairstyle 100% reference

promptZh: 使用上传的人脸，实现 100% 相同且真实的效果。这是一张超写实、电影质感的肖像，主体为一位 帅气的年轻男子，留着浓密的深色造型短发，蓄着胡须。他自信地向前走着，目光略微偏离镜头，带着淡淡的微笑。他身穿剪裁合身的 浅米色西装外套 和配套长裤，内搭一件 纯白色 T 恤，脚穿干净的白色运动鞋。一只手随意地插在裤兜里。场景空灵且充满未来感，地面光亮如镜，低处弥漫着白色的薄雾。他身后矗立着四块高大的垂直矩形镜子或玻璃板。每块面板都展示了同一个男人在不同姿势和不同服装下的略有差异的反射或替代版本。明亮、干净的工作室灯光，融合了冷色调与中性色调，细节丰富，照片级真实感，呈现编辑类时尚摄影风格。保持原始面部和发型 100% 参考。
